source_boundary.kyle: Runs pinned README/package static and explicit event-study examples; horizon = TRUE is recorded as a D023 approved divergence for didbjs RC-v1.
source_boundary.python: Runs pinned README did_imputation/event_plot examples whose inputs are available offline; complex-design snippets are covered by earlier dedicated fixtures.
source_boundary.stata: Curates the BJS did_imputation/event_plot portion of five_estimators_example.do; third-party estimators in that script are inventoried but not reimplemented by didbjs.
